'''Teyora Rekab''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Enso/Legends|Enso]] who [[Merchant/Legends|purveyed]] [[Hydroponics/Legends|hydroponic]] seeds and equipment. She was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of her own [[Starship/Legends|starship]], which her fellow Ensos crewed, and she used the vessel to ship hydroponics around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], including the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
Teyora Rekab [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ensolica]]—a cold world covered with tundra and [[Water/Legends|ice]]. Like the rest of her people, she became an expert on the matter of [[Plant/Legends|plant]] [[Hydroponics/Legends|hydroponics]]. Rekab was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], crewed by fellow [[Enso/Legends|Ensos]]. She and her crew made their living by [[Merchant/Legends|selling]] hydroponics equipment and seeds. They regularly visited the arid world of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where their customers were the local [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmers]]. While visiting the world, Rekab and her crew were forced to don rented [[coolth suit]]s—the biological makeup of the Ensos made them abhorrent to the heat of Tatooine, and if exposed to the planet's [[Binary star system/Legends|twin suns]], they would be susceptible to heat stroke.<ref name="db" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref>According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' the events of {{Film|I}} take place in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> Rekab was present in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Boonta Eve/Legends|Boonta's Eve]]. She later attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|annual]] [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] at the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] on Tatooine. Rekab watched as the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] completed the first of three scheduled laps, and at least at one point, she also removed her helmet.<ref name="tpm">{{Film|I}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Considered to be odd-looking,<ref name="FansSetTheFacts">{{SWArchive|url=databank/updates/news20080321.html|text=What's the Story: The Fans Set the Facts}}</ref> Teyora Rekab was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] Enso, a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Near-Human]]s. Rekab had blonde [[Hair/Legends|hair]], [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and light skin.<ref name="db" />

==Equipment==
In addition to providing herself and her crew with hired protective coolth suits, Rekab had the foresight to wear polarized [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]] while visiting Tatooine, as the suit's bubble did not protect against the glare of the planet's twin [[Star/Legends|suns]].<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
Teyora Rekab first appeared in the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], as an unnamed background extra in Mos Espa.<ref name="tpm" /> The character was later expanded upon and named by [[Nathan O'Keefe]] through [[StarWars.com]]'s [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] feature "[[What's The Story?]],"<ref name="db" /> published on the StarWars.com [[Databank (original)|Databank]] on [[January 12]], [[2007]].<ref name="jan12">{{SWArchive|url=databank/updates/news20070112.html|text=What's the Story: Episode I}}</ref>
